title: Hamble Blackspur Plastic Drain Leaf Guard Cover Gutter Barrier Protector, Pack of 2
features: Keep all those pesky leaves out of your drain. This plastic drain cover will prevent leaves from falling or being blown into your drain and causing awful blockages.

These nifty little devices are universal and will fit around more home gutter pipe drainage systems. Simply cut the thin piece of plastic at the back to allow your drain cover to be fitted around a drain.
These drain covers have been manufactured from durable plastic to ensure they can withstand against all the elements.
APPROX DIMENSIONS: L30 x W30 x H10cm, perfect to fit most drains.
